name: Dazing Coil
description:
Activate (Free Action) (concentrate)

Trigger You deal damage to an Off-Guard creature with the affixed weapon

This knot of copper wire reshapes itself in a new pattern every time its affixed weapon deals damage. When you activate the coil, the damaged creature must succeed at a DC 31 Will check save or be Stunned 1. If it critically fails, it instead becomes Stunned 2.
